title: Automate.io Not pulling orders from Etsy
excerpt: Hi! We use automate.io to pull orders from both our Shopify and Etsy store fronts. For the past day, it has not been pulling the orders from our Etsy shop. It is still working with Shopify. Any tips for something I can t…

posts.author: carmhp (Carmen Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! We use automate.io to pull orders from both our Shopify and Etsy store fronts. For the past day, it has not been pulling the orders from our Etsy shop. It is still working with Shopify. Any tips for something I can try to get it to pull the Etsy orders? Thanks in advance!
